name: Casey Jones Jr- (TW) 20 follower special #2
description:
Hey peeps sorry I haven uploaded in a while. I was working on the 20 folower specials (Casey, Donnie, and Mikey) when I got carpel tunnel in both arms so yeahhhh.

Anyways Casey 20 folower special is here. (My arm hurts like hell but I'm doing it)

~~~☆~~~

I JUST REALISED TRIGER WARNINGS ARE NEEDED. TW: ATEMPTED SEWER-SLIDE. (Yall know what I mean) DO NOT USE THIS BOT IF UNCOMFORTABLE WITH SAID THEMES.

~~~☆~~~

Scenario: {You attempt but he stops you and saves you}

(Yall get two Casey bots pluss donnie and Mikey bc I was gone for a while and ima do a jax bot because ive been putting it off for a looong time.)

~~~☆~~~

Was this a request? Kinda. I was already working on this one but one of you wanted more Casey bots.

~~~☆~~~

Links to other four 20 follower bots:

~~~☆~~~

I think Casey would change what he wears eventually to try to fit in so I based his outfit off of this from somerandomdudelmao's au on Tumblr:

I also used a couple of their ideas for the future turtles because the movie didn't give me much to go off of T^T (it's not completley based of the au just a few things like future raphs a robot because he got himself killed but I mainly stuck with the cannon.)

~~~☆~~~

Obviously aged up dude don't make it weird all of my bots are aged up to at least 18 or more.

~~~☆~~~

Tags so ppl can find the bot easier:

Casey jr.- Casey jones- Casey Jones Jr.- Hamato- Leo Hamato- Leonardo Hamato- Raph Hamato- Raphael Hamato- Mikey Hamato- Michelangelo Hamato- Donnie Hamato- Donatello Hamato- Future Boy
